title: Compare Strings by Frequency of the Smallest Character
titleCn: 比较字符串最小字母出现频次

testcases.input: queries = ["cbd"], words = ["zaaaz"] Output: [1] Explanation: On the first query we have f("cbd") = 1, f("zaaaz") = 3 so f("cbd") < f("zaaaz").
testcases.expectedOutput: [1] Explanation: On the first query we have f("cbd") = 1, f("zaaaz") = 3 so f("cbd") < f("zaaaz").

testcases.input: queries = ["bbb","cc"], words = ["a","aa","aaa","aaaa"] Output: [1,2] Explanation: On the first query only f("bbb") < f("aaaa"). On the second query both f("aaa") and f("aaaa") are both > f("cc").
testcases.expectedOutput: [1,2] Explanation: On the first query only f("bbb") < f("aaaa"). On the second query both f("aaa") and f("aaaa") are both > f("cc").
